text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Look at 'em, at each other's throats<n>again. Haha,
they've sure got spirit!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
"Frequent fights make for fast friends."<n>Whoever
first said that really got it right.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But, well, when it looks like fists are<n>about to fly,
you gotta step in!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We're Umamusume. A good ol'<n>fashioned race is
how we settle things!
